cwes.name: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
cwes.requirement: Resource consumption MUST be bounded with limits and timeouts

cwes.name: Invokable Control Element with Excessive File or Data Access Operations
cwes.requirement: Data access operations MUST be batched; no queries inside loops

cwes.name: Synchronous Access of Remote Resource without Timeout
cwes.requirement: Remote resource access MUST use timeouts and async patterns where available

cwes.name: Creation of Immutable Text Using String Concatenation
cwes.requirement: String building in loops MUST use builder/join patterns instead of concatenation

cwes.name: Excessive Data Query Operations in Large Data Table
cwes.requirement: Queries on large tables MUST use indexes and MUST NOT perform full table scans

cwes.name: Excessive Platform Resource Consumption within a Loop
cwes.requirement: Resource allocation inside loops MUST be minimised; pre-allocate where possible

cwes.name: Excessive Execution of Sequential Searches of Data Resource
cwes.requirement: Repeated lookups MUST use indexed structures (maps, sets) instead of linear search

cwes.name: Uncontrolled Recursion
cwes.requirement: Recursive algorithms MUST have depth limits to prevent stack overflow

cwes.name: Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling
cwes.requirement: Resource allocation MUST be throttled with configurable limits

cwes.name: Missing Release of Resource after Effective Lifetime
cwes.requirement: Resources MUST be released promptly after use

cwes.name: Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity
cwes.requirement: Regular expressions MUST NOT use patterns susceptible to catastrophic backtracking

cwes.name: Asymmetric Resource Consumption (Amplification)
cwes.requirement: Operations MUST NOT allow small inputs to trigger disproportionate resource consumption
